title: 盘点双库依赖并冻结命名窗口
description: 梳理仍依赖 `journal_biz`、`journal_admin`、`BizDB`、`AdminDB` 和旧无前缀业务表的服务、迁移、部署与离线入口。迁移窗口内冻结新增旧命名对象，新增表只能落到目标单库命名规范。
acceptance_criteria: 形成一份可审计依赖清单，至少覆盖 API、admin-api、admin-rpc、paper/user/news/rating-rpc、cron、docker-compose、k8s manifest 和 migrations；命名冻结规则明确要求新增对象只允许使用 `journal` + `biz_*`/`adm_*`；后续扫描仓库时，新增旧 schema 或旧表名引用必须能被该清单判定为越界。
review_initial_requirements: Review 时核对盘点范围是否覆盖配置、service context、迁移脚本和部署清单，不接受只扫业务代码；冻结规则必须能拦截新建 `journal_biz`/`journal_admin` 或无前缀表。
review_regression_requirements: 回归时重新扫描仓库，确认仅保留已登记的兼容/回滚引用，没有新增遗漏；抽查至少一条 cron 或 init 脚本，验证不在盘点盲区内。
notes: picked_reason:P0 foundation inventory and naming freeze unblock later schema/config changes;review_initial:audited API admin-api admin-rpc rpc cron docker-compose k8s and migrations coverage;review_regression:make db-naming-freeze-check;done_at:2026-03-13;evidence:inventory doc baseline csv and passing freeze guard

title: 定义单库 journal 与 biz_/adm_ 命名基线
description: 把目标逻辑库统一为 `journal`，将期刊业务表重命名为 `biz_*`，管理后台表统一为 `adm_*`。同步更新 schema baseline、初始化脚本、迁移脚本与表名常量，禁止新代码继续引用旧表名。
acceptance_criteria: `schema.sql` 与初始化/迁移基线只创建 `journal` 一个逻辑库；业务表集合至少覆盖 `biz_user`、`biz_user_achievement`、`biz_paper`、`biz_cold_paper`、`biz_rating`、`biz_news`、`biz_flag`、`biz_keyword_rule`，后台表继续使用 `adm_*`；除显式保留的兼容层或回滚脚本外，仓库中不再新增对旧 schema 或旧表名的直接引用。
review_initial_requirements: Review 时重点检查 DDL、seed、k8s init、应用常量是否同时切换，不接受只改 `schema.sql`；表名映射必须一一对应且没有漏表。
review_regression_requirements: 回归时执行 schema diff 或等价比对，确认目标库只剩单库命名；抽查至少一条业务链路和一条后台链路，验证生成 SQL 使用新前缀。
notes: blocked:runtime SQL table rename and single-schema DDL must land together with application DB entry unification or an explicit compatibility layer; current repo has neither compatibility views nor disposable DB validation for that coordinated cutover

title: 固化表级治理与分片候选边界
description: 明确哪些表继续单表治理，哪些表只预留分片或分区能力，并把阈值、路由键和非首批对象写清楚。避免把“合库”任务扩散成一次性全量分库分表。
acceptance_criteria: 存在一份表级治理清单，明确 `biz_user`、`biz_user_achievement`、`biz_news`、`biz_keyword_rule`、`adm_role`、`adm_user`、`adm_permission`、`adm_role_permission`、`adm_user_role` 保持单表；仅 `biz_rating`、`biz_flag`、`adm_audit_log` 需要预埋分片或分区方案；为每个候选对象给出触发阈值、路由键和归档策略，且首批范围明确排除 `biz_paper` 与 `biz_cold_paper`。
review_initial_requirements: Review 时检查是否把“候选对象”“真正启用物理拆分”“冷热分层”三个概念分开，避免设计文档偷换概念；阈值必须可量化，不接受“数据多了再拆”。
review_regression_requirements: 回归时对照容量数据或压测结果，确认没有把白名单外表提前纳入分片实现；复核 `biz_paper`/`biz_cold_paper` 仍保持冷热分层而非分片。
notes: picked_reason:P1 governance whitelist can progress independently while P0 runtime schema cutover stays blocked;review_initial:single-table whitelist sharding candidates thresholds and hot-cold exclusions are separated explicitly;review_regression:document forbids non-whitelist sharding and keeps biz_paper or biz_cold_paper in hot-cold mode only;validation_limited:no live capacity metrics or benchmark evidence is available from this repo to prove thresholds have been reached or avoided;manual_test:compare the thresholds in backend/docs/release/2026-03-13-table-governance-boundary.md against production row-count index-size and write-QPS metrics before enabling any candidate;evidence:table governance boundary doc with quantized thresholds and whitelist rules;risk:low document fixes scope but real promotion from candidate to enabled still depends on environment metrics;done_at:2026-03-13

title: 设计可回滚的单库迁移方案
description: 先让目标单库和新前缀表结构就位，再把 `journal_biz.*` 与 `journal_admin.*` 映射到新表。迁移方案必须保留旧库只读回退窗口，避免一次性重命名后失去快速回滚能力。
acceptance_criteria: 迁移脚本或 runbook 能创建目标 `journal` 库与所有前缀表，并支持 dry-run/演练；一次完整演练后，新旧表的关键行数和主键范围可核对一致；切换期间旧 schema 保持只读回退窗口，发生问题时可在不做整库回迁的前提下恢复旧读写路径。
review_initial_requirements: Review 时检查脚本是否默认走“新表就位 + 应用切换”，不要把直接 `RENAME` 当默认路径；必须写清楚双写、兼容视图或只读回退窗口的使用条件。
review_regression_requirements: 回归时做至少一次全流程迁移 rehearsal，验证行数对账、读流量切换和回退路径都可执行；故障注入后应能回退到旧 schema 或兼容映射。
notes: picked_reason:P0 migration rehearsal and rollback window unblock later schema and config cutover;review_initial:default path is create-and-copy with rollback window and dual-write fallback only;review_regression:dry-run workbook rendered for bootstrap backfill verify rollback;validation_limited:no disposable MySQL rehearsal environment in repo for live copy cutover and rollback execution;manual_test:make single-db-merge-dry-run && python3 scripts/rehearse_single_db_merge.py --phase all > /tmp/single-db-merge.sql && mysql --default-character-set=utf8mb4 < /tmp/single-db-merge.sql && rerun generated verify queries after write freeze and rollback drill;evidence:make single-db-merge-dry-run;python3 -m py_compile backend/scripts/check_legacy_db_refs.py backend/scripts/rehearse_single_db_merge.py;risk:medium live copy timing rollback execution and row-count reconciliation still need preprod rehearsal;done_at:2026-03-13

title: 统一应用层数据库访问入口
description: 把服务层按 `BizDB`/`AdminDB` 分开的配置、初始化和 repository 入口收敛为单主库配置加可选读副本列表。同步收口跨域 SQL，禁止继续依赖跨库 join。
acceptance_criteria: API、admin-api、admin-rpc 等同时读业务和后台表的服务不再要求两个逻辑 schema 配置项，而是通过单库前缀或受控兼容层访问；service context 与 config struct 的数据库入口完成收口，新增代码不得继续注册 `biz`/`admin` 两套 schema；改造后的 SQL 不再出现跨库 join，新跨域读取必须通过同库不同前缀表或服务层聚合实现。
review_initial_requirements: Review 时检查配置变更是否覆盖本地 YAML、k8s manifest 和公共 config struct，避免只改一层；对保留的兼容适配器要注明移除条件和期限。
review_regression_requirements: 回归时启动至少一条 API 链路和一条 admin 链路，确认服务初始化与查询路径都不再依赖双 schema 配置；再次扫描仓库，确保没有新增跨库 join。
notes: blocked:single DB entry refactor depends on JDB-020 table naming plus a verified compatibility layer for mixed biz or admin reads; without that coupling the service contexts and YAML changes would break current runtime queries

title: 按服务灰度启用读写分离
description: 先在论文查询、列表页、新闻列表、评分聚合等读多写少场景启用副本读；登录、权限校验、后台操作和写后立刻读链路继续走主库或显式一致性兜底。灰度方案必须带监控、健康探测和降级开关。
acceptance_criteria: 至少圈定一批可灰度的只读/弱一致链路和一批必须主库直读的强一致链路，并写入配置与 runbook；副本延迟、主从健康、查询超时降级到主库、读后写一致性策略都有可执行验证步骤；灰度期间可以按服务或按链路关闭读写分离并恢复主库读。
review_initial_requirements: Review 时检查“谁能读副本、谁不能”是否按业务语义枚举清楚，不能只看 QPS；监控、熔断和降级路径必须在代码或配置中可定位，不能停留在口头说明。
review_regression_requirements: 回归时做主从延迟和副本不可用演练，确认查询链路自动降级到主库且登录/权限/审核等强一致路径不受影响；核对指标与告警是否能区分主库和副本。
notes: picked_reason:P0 rollout matrix can close with existing config toggles and explicit primary-read anchors before schema unification lands;review_initial:replica-safe and primary-only paths are now enumerated by business semantics and code anchors;review_regression:go test ./common/dbconfig and rollout drills are tied to service-level ReadWriteSplit toggles;validation_limited:no replica topology or live lag or timeout drill can be executed from this repo alone;manual_test:apply the drills in backend/docs/release/2026-03-13-rw-split-rollout-matrix.md on preprod then archive lag outage and write-after-read evidence;evidence:go test ./common/dbconfig;risk:medium service-level rollback is defined but live primary or replica metrics and outage behavior still need environment validation;done_at:2026-03-13

title: 为热点表预埋分片与分区规则
description: 只为 `biz_rating`、`biz_flag`、`adm_audit_log` 设计首批分片/分区规则，明确路由键、时间维度和启用阈值。保持 `biz_paper` 与 `biz_cold_paper` 的冷热分层，不把它们纳入第一批物理拆分。
acceptance_criteria: 针对 `biz_rating` 明确 `paper_id` 或其 hash 的水平路由方案，针对 `biz_flag` 明确 `target_type + target_id` hash 或按时间归档方案，针对 `adm_audit_log` 明确按月分区或按时间分表方案；每个对象都定义启用阈值，至少包括单表行数、热点索引体积和写入 QPS；首批交付中不存在对白名单外表的物理分片实现。
review_initial_requirements: Review 时要求每个方案都说明查询代价、聚合代价和回收归档策略，不能只有建表草图；若引入路由层，必须说明如何避免跨分片事务扩大范围。
review_regression_requirements: 回归时依据 explain、容量估算或压测数据复核路由键是否支撑主查询；确认 `biz_paper`/`biz_cold_paper` 仍只做冷热分层，没有被顺手分片。
notes: picked_reason:P1 hotspot shard POC rules can land after governance boundary while runtime cutover stays blocked;review_initial:each candidate now has route key threshold query cost aggregation cost and archive strategy;review_regression:document explicitly excludes biz_paper and biz_cold_paper from first-batch physical split;validation_limited:no explain output capacity sample or benchmark trace is available from this repo to prove the routing keys on live data;manual_test:validate the PoC routes in backend/docs/release/2026-03-13-hotspot-sharding-poc.md against explain output and load tests before enabling any shard router;evidence:hotspot sharding PoC doc with per-object route keys thresholds and non-goals;risk:low PoC scope is fixed but live shard enablement still depends on metrics explain and rollback validation;done_at:2026-03-13

title: 建立迁移回归与压测验证矩阵
description: 把 schema diff、迁移演练、读写分离配置回归、主从延迟故障演练、核心查询 explain、热点写入压测和后台权限链路验证收成统一的验证矩阵。上线前必须至少完成一次全量 rehearsal。
acceptance_criteria: 验证矩阵覆盖 schema diff、全量或等价样本迁移演练、读写分离回归、主从延迟故障注入、核心查询 explain、热点写入压测和后台权限链路验证；至少完成一次预发或等价环境 rehearsal，并留存结果、结论和阻塞项；旧库回退路径、读流量切换和业务指标监控都有明确的通过/失败口径。
review_initial_requirements: Review 时检查验证矩阵是否有明确环境、数据样本和通过门槛，不接受“人工看看”；压测与故障演练需要定义触发条件和预期降级行为。
review_regression_requirements: 回归时复核 rehearsal 证据、explain 结果和监控面板，确认所有高风险项都经过实测；至少重放一次回退动作，验证 runbook 不依赖临时人工记忆。
notes: picked_reason:P0 validation matrix turns prior migration outputs into explicit go-no-go evidence and blockers;review_initial:matrix now binds each gate to env entrypoint pass criteria and blocker;review_regression:reran make db-naming-freeze-check and make single-db-merge-dry-run against the documented entrypoints;validation_limited:no pre-production MySQL or replica topology is available from this repo for live rehearsal explain capture or rollback timing;manual_test:execute the matrix rows in backend/docs/release/2026-03-13-db-merge-validation-matrix.md on a disposable MySQL environment and archive row-count explain benchmark and rollback evidence;evidence:make db-naming-freeze-check;make single-db-merge-dry-run;risk:medium the matrix is complete but full rehearsal and load evidence still depend on external environment;done_at:2026-03-13

title: 按里程碑切换并固化回滚手册
description: 按 M1 到 M5 拆分切换节点，分别定义 go/no-go 门槛、责任人、证据和回滚动作。任何阶段出现兼容性或一致性问题时，都应先关闭读写分离并恢复主库读，再按最小动作回退到旧 schema 或旧表名映射。
acceptance_criteria: M1 命名与 DDL 基线、M2 应用层入口统一、M3 单库切换、M4 读写分离灰度、M5 热点表分片 PoC 五个里程碑都有明确 owner、门槛和证据清单；每个里程碑都定义一套可执行回滚步骤，且回滚目标不需要完整数据回迁；至少完成一次从副本读恢复到主库读、再恢复旧 schema 或兼容映射的演练。
review_initial_requirements: Review 时检查里程碑门槛是否与前面 issues 的验收标准对齐，不接受“先上线再看”；回滚步骤必须精确到配置项、脚本或命令入口。
review_regression_requirements: 回归时按 runbook 做一次完整 go/no-go 复盘，确认告警、指标、回滚开关和兼容映射都能独立执行；核对最终文档中没有遗漏 owner 或回滚责任边界。
notes: picked_reason:P0 milestone handbook makes cutover gates and rollback ownership explicit before higher-risk code changes;review_initial:runbook now binds M1-M5 to owners gates evidence and rollback entrypoints;review_regression:cross-checked milestone blockers against the validation matrix and single-db merge runbook;validation_limited:no live replica-read rollback drill or old-schema recovery drill can be executed from this repo alone;manual_test:walk each milestone in backend/docs/release/2026-03-13-db-merge-milestone-runbook.md on the target environment and archive the rollback drill output before advancing to the next milestone;evidence:milestone runbook references explicit commands and blockers from the validation matrix and single-db merge runbook;risk:medium ownership and rollback order are fixed but live drill evidence still depends on external environment;done_at:2026-03-13
